attributes.content:
## Overview

The Survey card gives the workspace a structured home for survey with questions, response collection, and results analysis.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Survey turns raw activity into structured measurement. The card needs to stay queryable, filterable, and composable so that summaries, dashboards, and automations can build on top of it instead of recreating calculations downstream.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Report]]** -- Survey can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Metrics (KPI)]]** -- Metrics (KPI) can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Survey.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Survey can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Survey can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Survey.
- **[[Project]]** -- Survey can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Questionnaire]]** -- Questionnaire can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Survey.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Survey as the structured home for survey with questions, response collection, and results analysis and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Survey when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Survey stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Survey
cardInfo.summary: Survey with questions, response collection, and results analysis.
